original:
A junior officer pokes their head into the briefing room, "$PlayerSirOrMadam, my apologies. The chief thought you'd want to see this."

Two burly salvors, still in their sweaty suit-liners, haul a crate and set it on the deckplates with a solid thump. With an impish grin, one of them looses the catches and together they pull the top-cover away.

It's filled with work-gloves. All of like chirality.

Bornanew lets out a breath.

"I ought to have anticipated this." He sounds annoyed with himself. "Costs no more to run a batch of one than of..." He reaches in, picking up a glove, then pressing into the cargo container to feel for density. "Five-twelve?" He turns to you. "Perhaps five hundred eleven, without our other hard-won specimen?"

He wipes his hands, as if something unpleasant had got on them. "These will need to be destroyed."

It is done with swift enthusiasm by a crew monitored by your ops chief.

The last step is the capture of Bornanew's mole on Tartessus.

A cloud of icons, sigils, words forms. Names, front companies, ships, codewords, and references to theological agitprop. Your tech officer's hands blur as they manipulate an interface invisible to you; his subtle cybermods blink rapidly. And then stop, steady.

"Captain, we may have something."

Their eyes refocus on the real world again, taking a moment to adapt to mundanity. "Something for your, ah, consultant. The Knight."

"A word. Maybe a code? A name? It comes up several times, relating to Tartessus and the template they fed into the forge."

"The word is 'Keepfaith'. One word. Maybe it means something special to the Ludd... ics?"

option_line: bffi_psDestroyedBornMed2:"Clean up some representative samples for me."
original: Clean up some representative samples for me.

"Keepfaith," Bornanew says, repeating the last word of your question.

He leans back in his bed, his eyes darting around some internal catalogue. His notebook appears in his hands - it is impressive to have snuck an outside object past the wary eye of your senior medical officer - and he flips to a page to check something. 

"Subcurate Cedra Keepfaith. Authority over the scriptorium of the Holy Cathedral of Exodus, on Tartessus, in the Eos Exodus system."
